name: Lil Rel Howery
bio: Milton Lil Rel Howery Jr. is an American stand-up comedian and actor who grew up on the West Side of Chicago. He built a stand-up career through the 2010s before breaking out as Rod Williams in Jordan Peele's Get Out and starring in his own NBC sitcom, Rel. He has released specials on Comedy Central and HBO.

timeline.ev: Joins NBC sitcom The Carmichael Show
Plays Rod Williams in the film Get Out
Creates and stars in the Fox sitcom Rel
HBO special Live in Crenshaw released

accolades: MTV Movie and TV Award for Best Comedic Performance for Get Out (2017)
Stand-up specials on Comedy Central and HBO
Creator and star of the sitcom Rel
